title: Create backfill-employee-master.ts script
description: Create backfill script to update employees table with currentEmpCode based on NIK lookup

files.change: Create backfill script for employee master data

implementation: Query employees WHERE current_emp_code IS NULL AND nik IS NOT NULL
Update employees with current_emp_code, current_emp_name, identity_source='HR_SNAPSHOT'

criteria: Employees with NIK get current_emp_code populated

success_metrics: > 95% of employees with NIK get current_emp_code
